title: Felicify Military Weapons Set, 129pcs WW2 Weapons Set, Army Minifigures, Military Brickarms, Modern Military Toy Set, Guns Weapon Pack, Swat Pieces and Parts Accessories
features: Rich Military Toy Set: If you want to build a powerful toy army, the weapon toy set will meet your needs. The set contains various models of weapons and equipment, enough to equip a military team and enjoy the fun of military battlefield games
Materials: WW2 weapon set is made of plastic, which is durable, non-fading and reusable

Easy to Use: Most accessories in military weapons do not require assembly and can be used directly, conveniently and quickly. Only a few accessories require simple assembly, and the assembly process is very simple and you don't need to worry

Have Fun: This toy set is themed on World War II and displays various styles of weapons in World War II. You can experience the fun of identification games and is very suitable for military toy enthusiasts
Note: This military weapon set contains various small parts and is not suitable for children under 3 years. Please use it under adult supervision
